generated_exposure.exposure_text: Did you know our allies are actually costing us more than they contribute? While we're spending billions on collective defense, some partners aren't meeting their commitments. It's time to reassess our burden-sharing agreements to ensure our security comes first. #NationalSecurity #AllianceCommitments
